label: Probability theory

node.label: Probability theory
node.definition: Random variables, distributions, conditional dependence, and expectation provide the language of uncertainty and generative modeling.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Probability theory is to connect lower-level principles to downstream capabilities including Statistics & experimental design, Information theory, Signal processing & harmonic analysis.
examples: substrate for Signal processing & harmonic analysis
limitations: Its abstractions require explicit assumptions; a mathematically valid result can still be irrelevant to a mismatched empirical setting.

sentence_units.text: Random variables, distributions, conditional dependence, and expectation provide the language of uncertainty and generative modeling.
The role of Probability theory is to connect lower-level principles to downstream capabilities including Statistics & experimental design, Information theory, Signal processing & harmonic analysis.
substrate for Signal processing & harmonic analysis
Its abstractions require explicit assumptions; a mathematically valid result can still be irrelevant to a mismatched empirical setting.
